description: [fulfill-ui] SO list/detail exposes a Fulfill action for orders in status confirmed or partially_fulfilled
[fulfill-ui] Fulfill dialog lists lines with ordered/fulfilled/remaining and accepts a per-line quantity for non-serialized lines, capped at remaining
[fulfill-ui] Serialized lines get a unit picker searchable by serial or MAC, preselecting `remaining` units FIFO by received_at
[fulfill-ui] Unit picker excludes units hard-held by other SO lines and visibly labels units soft-allocated to other lines
[fulfill-ui] Fulfill dialog offers a source-location selector defaulting to the allocation-resolved location
[fulfill-ui] Insufficient availability shows a soft warning in the dialog but does not block submission (soft-consume design)
[fulfill-ui] Successful fulfill refreshes the SO status chip (confirmed → partially_fulfilled → fulfilled) without a page reload
[invoice] New billing-package action fulfillAndInvoiceSoLine composes inventory fulfill + generateInvoiceForSalesOrder honoring invoice_mode (billing→inventory dependency direction preserved)
[invoice] With invoice_mode='on_fulfillment', fulfilling a line automatically bills the newly fulfilled quantity
[invoice] SO detail shows per-line quantity_invoiced and links to the generated invoice(s)
[invoice] Manual mode exposes a Generate-invoice action that bills uninvoiced quantities and surfaces the created invoice number
[dropship] Drop-ship lines expose a Confirm-vendor-shipment UI capturing serials/MAC/warranty (serialized), marking the line fulfilled with on-hand untouched at every location
[backorder] SO detail surfaces computed per-line backorder quantity
[backorder] Create-draft-PO-from-backorder button wires suggestPoFromBackorder and links the created PO(s) from the SO
[reopen] Reopen-to-draft action releases allocations and returns a confirmed SO to draft, enabled only when no line has fulfilled or invoiced quantity
[reopen] After reopen, line add/edit/remove work again under the existing draft-only guards
[ui-guards] Confirm, Cancel, Fulfill, Generate-invoice, and Reopen buttons disable while their action promise is in flight
[locks] confirmSalesOrder, cancelSalesOrder, releaseSalesOrderAllocation, and reopen take a FOR UPDATE lock on the sales_orders row before the status guard
[locks] dispatchTransfer, receiveTransfer, and cancelTransfer lock the stock_transfers row; a concurrent duplicate receive/cancel is rejected by the post-lock status guard
[locks] receivePoLine and cancelPurchaseOrder lock the purchase_orders header row
[locks] Every RMA status transition locks the rma_cases row before asserting current status
[locks] Serialized candidate-unit selection in allocation and fulfillment uses FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED so two orders cannot claim the same unit
[caps] fulfillSalesOrderLine enforces the ordered cap in SQL (UPDATE … WHERE fulfilled + qty <= ordered, rowcount-checked) instead of a blind add
[alloc-math] allocateLine reserves min(available, remaining) so reserved_quantity can never exceed quantity_on_hand
[alloc-math] Backorder and suggested-PO shortfall math excludes the SO's own reservation (order 10 with 3 on hand suggests buying 7, not 17)
[alloc-math] Serialized hard-allocation accounting is symmetric: fulfillment no longer decrements a held_quantity that allocation never incremented
[reconcile] reconcileStockLevels recomputes reserved_quantity and held_quantity from live SO allocations in addition to on-hand
[reconcile] Permission-gated admin Rebuild-stock-caches action + UI button runs reconcile for the tenant and reports what it corrected

[asset-integrity] Asset creation during fulfillment no longer commits mid-transaction: links are created after the stock transaction commits, with failures surfaced for retry (no orphan assets on rollback)

[schema-checks] Migration adds CHECKs: reserved_quantity >= 0 and held_quantity >= 0 on stock_levels; quantity > 0 on PO/SO/transfer lines; quantity_received/fulfilled/invoiced >= 0; SO-line fulfilled <= ordered and invoiced <= ordered (quantity_on_hand deliberately unconstrained)
[schema-checks] The CHECK migration pre-clamps existing violating rows (negative reserved/held) before adding constraints so it cannot fail on drifted data
[scoping] assertLocationWritable enforced in receiveStockManual
[scoping] assertLocationWritable enforced in retireStock
[scoping] assertLocationWritable enforced on the source location in dispatchTransfer
[scoping] assertLocationWritable enforced on the source location in fulfillSalesOrderLine
[scoping] assertLocationWritable enforced in loanOut and restock-return flows
[alerts] Daily tenant-scoped job resolves low-stock routing and sends a notification (existing notification infra) to each location's manager_user_id covering only that location
[alerts] Locations without a manager produce no notification (no firehose); the job logs them in its run summary
[rma] deployReplacement accepts standard-track cases (status 'replaced'), delivering the replacement unit and relinking the client asset with updated serial/MAC
[rma] chargeForUnreturned creates a draft manual invoice (replacement product at list price) and stores the invoice reference on the RMA case
[rma] Unreachable status 'dead_unit_returned' removed from the rma_cases CHECK (dead_unit_returned_at remains the record)
[currency] receivePoLine rejects receipts whose cost currency mismatches the product's existing cost_currency (same guard receiveStockManual already has)
[currency] createPoFromLowStock groups suggestions by (vendor, currency) and stamps each PO header from its lines instead of hardcoded USD
[materials] recordStockConsumption honors creates_asset_on_delivery for serialized units on the ticket/project materials path (asset created + bidirectionally linked)
[tax] SO-line tax_rate_id is passed through the invoice bridge onto the generated invoice item
[schema] Migration adds composite FK sales_order_lines.tax_rate_id → tax_rates
[schema] Migration adds nullable so_line_id backlink on invoice_items; the invoice bridge populates it
[schema] Migration adds hot-path indexes: stock_levels (tenant, location_id); sales_orders (tenant, client_id) and (tenant, status); purchase_orders (tenant, vendor_id) and (tenant, status)

[schema] Migration adds composite FKs + indexes (ON DELETE SET NULL) for stock_units.allocated_so_line_id, stock_units.source_po_id, purchase_order_lines.source_so_line_id, sales_order_lines.parent_so_line_id
[schema] DB trigger rejects UPDATE and DELETE on stock_movements (ledger immutability enforced, not just documented)
[serials] Positive serialized adjustments require caller-supplied serial numbers (UI serial entry); fabricated ADJ-* serials removed

[vendor-pricing] Migration creates vendor_products: PK (tenant, vendor_id, service_id), vendor_sku, unit_cost (cents), cost_currency, lead_time_days, is_preferred, with composite FKs and a partial unique index enforcing one preferred offer per (tenant, service_id)
[vendor-pricing] CRUD server actions for vendor_products gated by vendor read/update permissions
[vendor-pricing] Vendor detail UI gains a price-list tab: list/add/edit/remove product offers with vendor SKU, cost, currency, lead time, preferred flag
[vendor-pricing] Product inventory settings panel shows that product's vendor offers (read-only)
[vendor-pricing] Adding a PO line defaults unit_cost, currency, and vendor SKU from the PO vendor's vendor_products row when present (fallback: existing average/catalog cost)
[vendor-pricing] PO line UI displays the vendor SKU when known
[vendor-pricing] createPoFromLowStock and suggestPoFromBackorder price suggested lines from the preferred vendor's offer (cost + currency) when one exists

[cycle-count] Migration creates count_sessions (location, status draft/in_progress/review/approved/cancelled, created_by, approved_by, timestamps) and count_lines (service, expected snapshot, counted_qty, counted serials, variance) with composite FKs and status CHECKs
[cycle-count] New cycle_count permission resource (create/read/update/delete) seeded to admin/manager roles
[cycle-count] Start-count action snapshots expected on-hand per tracked product at the location into count_lines
[cycle-count] Count entry UI: per-product counted-quantity entry with in-session search; expected quantities hidden from counters (blind count)
[cycle-count] Serialized count lines accept a serial list; expected-but-unscanned units are flagged missing and unexpected serials flagged for disposition
[cycle-count] Variance review screen (approver-only) shows counted vs expected with quantity delta and value at average cost
[cycle-count] Approval (cycle_count permission + location scope) writes adjust movements with reason 'cycle_count' per variance and closes the session; counting respects location scoping
[cycle-count] On approval, missing serialized units are retired; unexpected serials require explicit disposition (add with real serial or exclude)
[cycle-count] Stock mutations at the location during an open session mark affected count lines stale (recount prompt) instead of corrupting variance math
[cycle-count] Sessions list + per-location history (counter, approver, net variance); cancelling a session discards it with no stock effect
[landed-cost] Migration creates po_landed_costs: cost_type (freight/duty/other), amount (cents), currency matching the PO, allocation_method (value/quantity), applied flag
[landed-cost] Actions + PO UI to add/edit/remove landed-cost entries while unapplied
[landed-cost] Apply-landed-cost action allocates entries across received line quantities by the chosen method; idempotent via the applied flag
[landed-cost] Application adjusts the non-serialized moving-average cost via a cost-only adjustment (no phantom quantity movement)
[landed-cost] Application bumps unit_cost on serialized units received from that PO
[landed-cost] PO detail shows the landed-cost total and per-line effective unit cost (base + allocated)

[vendor-bills] Migration creates vendor_bills (vendor, bill_number unique per tenant+vendor, bill_date, due_date, currency, status draft/open/paid/void, nullable po_id, total cents) and vendor_bill_lines, with composite FKs and status CHECKs
[vendor-bills] New vendor_bill permission resource (CRUD) seeded to admin/back-office roles
[vendor-bills] CRUD actions incl. status transitions draft→open→paid and void
[vendor-bills] Create-bill-from-PO prefills lines from received quantities and costs
[vendor-bills] Due date defaults from the vendor's payment_terms (e.g., net30 → bill_date + 30 days)
[vendor-bills] Bill shows a non-blocking 2-way variance indicator vs the PO's received value
[vendor-bills] Vendor bills list UI with status filter, mark-paid, and void
[vendor-bills] Dashboard widget: open vendor bills with aging (due / overdue buckets)
Vendor-owed RMA aging: dashboard attention item for cases sent_to_vendor with days-at-vendor and unit cost at stake (red >= 30 days)
Drop-ship confirmations auto-invoice under invoice_mode=on_fulfillment via billing-side confirmDropShipAndInvoice composition (parity with from-stock fulfillment)
Unbilled-shipment nag fires on ANY sales-order line with quantity_fulfilled > quantity_invoiced (amber, dollars shown), not only fully-fulfilled orders

Write-offs report: /msp/inventory/write-offs page + writeOffReport action — adjustments/retirements/count corrections with signed quantities and dollars, per-user totals over the full range, 500-row display cap flagged
Four-eyes count approval: the session creator or anyone who recorded a count cannot approve it when another user holds cycle_count:approve (single-approver tenants may self-approve)

Van load list: computeLoadList action (destination shortfalls vs reorder points, capped by source availability, zero-load rows kept visible, FIFO serial suggestions) + Transfers-page dialog that reviews/edits the list and dispatches a branch-to-van transfer in one click
RMA replacement units default to the replaced (dead) unit's cost and currency when received without an explicit cost — free replacements are not free stock
Vendor-bill lines carry po_unit_cost and line_variance_cents vs the linked PO (LATERAL, no fan-out); bill detail shows a per-line signed 'vs PO' delta pinpointing price creep

Unit chain-of-custody timeline: per-unit History dialog on the units screen (unit card + full movement ledger with locations and reasons) and serial+MAC CSV export of the visible rows for provisioning
Delivered-unit asset creation carries the MAC address into the asset's attributes (mac_address)
